nasb.text: Because of this will not the land quake And everyone who dwells in it mourn? Indeed, all of it will rise up like the Nile, And it will be tossed about And subside like the Nile of Egypt.

esv.text: Shall not the land tremble on this account, and everyone mourn who dwells in it, and all of it rise like the Nile, and be tossed about and sink again, like the Nile of Egypt?”

cnv.text: “這地不應為此震動， 所有住在地上的不應悲哀嗎？ 這地必像尼羅河高漲翻騰， 像埃及的大河退落。

ccb.text: 这片土地要因此而震动， 那里的人都要悲哀。 大地要像尼罗河一样涨起，如埃及的河流翻腾退落。”
